legal.tos_s1_p: Signal_guinee is a citizen digital platform allowing residents of Guinea (and specifically Conakry) to report incidents on public roads (damaged infrastructure, cleanliness issues, immediate dangers). The use of our platform is subject to the acceptance of these terms.
legal.tos_s2_p: By submitting a report on Signal_guinee, you agree to:
legal.tos_s2_l2: Not publish photos containing identifiable faces or license plates without the consent of the individuals concerned.
legal.tos_s2_l3: Not issue false alerts in order to disrupt the operation of public services.
legal.tos_s2_l4: Maintain a courteous and respectful language in incident descriptions.
legal.tos_s3_p: The Signal_guinee team and partner local authorities reserve the right to moderate, modify or delete any report deemed inappropriate, inaccurate, or not complying with these terms. User accounts responsible for repeated abuse may be permanently suspended.
legal.tos_s4_p: To ensure the accuracy of reports, the application may require access to the GPS location of your device. This location is only used when creating a report and is not tracked in the background.
legal.tos_s5_p: By uploading a photograph to Signal_guinee, you grant local authorities a non-exclusive right to use this image for incident resolution and public infrastructure management purposes.
legal.privacy_s1_p: As part of using Signal_guinee, we collect the following data: name, email address, location (GPS) during a report, uploaded photos, and basic navigation information.
legal.privacy_s2_p: Your data is used exclusively to: facilitate the processing of reports by local authorities, inform you of the status of your reports, improve the application's functionality, and prevent abuse.
legal.privacy_s3_p: Report data (photos, location, description) are shared publicly on the interactive map (without your full identity). Your contact information is only shared with municipal partner services responsible for resolving incidents.
legal.privacy_s4_p: In accordance with data protection regulations, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data. You can exercise these rights by contacting us via your personal space.
legal.cookie_intro: Signal_guinee uses cookies to improve your experience on our platform.
legal.cookie_s1_p: These cookies are essential for the site to function. They allow you to log into your account, save your theme preferences (Light/Dark), and secure your browsing.
legal.cookie_s2_p: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the map and forms, by collecting information anonymously. This allows us to improve the interface and speed of the service.
legal.cookie_s3_p: With your explicit consent, we use temporary location data to center the map on your current position and facilitate your reports.
legal.cookie_s4_p: You can configure your browser to block these cookies, but some parts of the application (such as keeping you logged in or dark mode) may not function correctly.
